pi_items.source: Task description line 5: 'Create a new encounter role with the following details: - Name: Scrub Nurse'

Task description: 'Nurse who assists the surgical team by handling instruments and supplies during surgical procedures' - contains all three keywords: 'nurse' (appears), 'surgical' (in 'surgical team'), 'instruments' (explicit)

OpenMRS REST API documentation (rest.openmrs.org) confirms /encounterrole as valid endpoint for encounter role management. Used in setup_task.sh line 16 and export_result.sh line 17 as: openmrs_api_get "/encounterrole?q=Scrub+Nurse&v=default"

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a new encounter role named 'Scrub Nurse' in the OpenMRS/Bahmni hospital information system. The role description must contain the keywords 'nurse', 'surgical', and 'instruments'. The creation is performed via the OpenMRS REST API endpoint /encounterrole using basic HTTP authentication (credentials: superman/Admin123). This is a demonstration task using synthetic data - the role created is a test/training scenario for a hospital's surgical department documentation workflow.
